objective.question: Is the SampleBaseToken/SampleVaultToken setup acceptable for Gearbox Credit Account opening analysis?
objective.thesis: Treat this as an Analyze-stage scaffold only; the runner must not infer Credit Account opening readiness.
objective.requested_decision: Return asset and oracle evidence packets plus blocked next checks, not an execution recommendation.

assets.intended_use: synthetic collateral exposure and possible underlying for SampleVaultToken analysis
Candidate collateral exposure for Gearbox Credit Account opening analysis

analysis_questions: What live Gearbox feed, if any, supports SampleBaseToken as collateral?
Which side bears loss under temporary versus persistent SampleBaseToken price divergence?

feed_discovery_paths: SampleVaultToken vault share price and underlying SampleBaseToken feed
analysis_questions: Does the oracle parse the vault share value recursively instead of stopping at a top-level label?
Which inputs drive borrower-friendly versus pool-LP-risky outcomes?

constraints: Keep Preview and Execute blocked unless live Gearbox support, oracle/feed status, wallet eligibility, and size-specific route checks are separately proven.
Do not invent missing live values.
